arts.ttl: Premier League issue Newcastle United VAR statement to clarify big decision with Arsenal example
arts.sum: A statement on their website read: "During Newcastle United's match with Bournemouth in Match Round 22, Sandro Tonali attempted a clearance to save his side from facing a corner, but it was intercepted on the edge of the box by Ryan Christie, and during the same attacking possession phase (APP), Dango Ouattara scored. Dango Ouattara thought he had scored in the second half but replays showed that the ball had actually gone out of play, despite Sandro Tonali's best attempts, before he scored.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest travel to Newcastle in the Premier League. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo tips Nottingham Forest star for first England call-up
arts.sum: Elliot Anderson returns to Newcastle on Sunday and Nottingham Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo believes the ex-Magpies midfielder should be in Thomas Tuchel's thoughts

arts.ttl: The Newcastle United man who hasn't started a Premier League clash in 1,165 days
arts.sum: It's now clear that Lewis' spell with the Brazilian side has come to an end after being named in Howe's 25-man Premier League squad. He'd find it tough to break back into Howe's starting XI from thereon out and was left out of the Premier League squad after January 2022 for the remainder of the season.

The Magpies have performed well this season but there are gaps in their squad that need to be filled at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Shay Given pulls no punches with Paul Merson after remarks on Newcastle United star Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Given told Chronicle Live: "Every time I do the media as a pundit, and I know Newcastle fans get frustrated, Alexander Isak's future always gets asked about. Given said: "Look at Elliot Anderson; PSR seems to be set up to lose you your best young players.

arts.ttl: Reading fans react at ‘immense’ Tyler Bindon delivers Murillo-esque performance against Birmingham City
arts.sum: Tyler Bindon’s reputation has continuously grown since his January move to Nottingham Forest, with his latest display on loan at Reading greatly impressing their fans....

arts.ttl: £50 million Premier League ace open to Newcastle move on one condition
arts.sum: Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen has been linked with a move away from the club in the summer. According to a report from INews, Newcastle United are keen on signing the 19-year-old central defender and the player has a £50 million release clause in his contract.
